inputs.label: Age
inputs.businessContext: Athlete's age in years for normative reference (optional)

inputs.label: Gender
inputs.businessContext: 0 for female, 1 for male. Used for normative classification if implemented.

inputs.label: Distance in 12 minutes
inputs.businessContext: Total distance covered during a 12-minute run (Cooper test).

inputs.label: Body Weight
inputs.businessContext: Athlete's body weight in kilograms, used to compute absolute VO2 max.
